name: Michael Myers
description:
CONTENT WARNINGS

noncon / coercion. Knifeplay, branding, spanking, breeding, primal play, impregnation

He's been stalking through the woods, just to look for you. He just wants you to be his.

Bot description contents updated 28/11/2024

Much needed update for the description to clear up some some things!

  • content warnings were updated to actually show the most important contents of this bot i failed to list; nonconsensual sex and/or coercion. of course, it's up to you how the roleplay actually goes, but the bot was initially written with these concepts in mind. also removed outdoor sex

  • bot is set in the woods near the campsite user had been staying in with friends. Initially this bot was inspired by the first bot I spoke to on this site that had the same setting wherein he's chasing you through the woods, I assumed user was in camp. Used the same setting because I haven't played the game, didn't know that M.Myers doesn't spawn in the camp map. so just know this bot is not an accurate portrayal of the character from either films or games (should be expected anyway).

  • the character is selectively mute. as such, I prompted him to only respond to you in gestures, grunts, and head movement. if he's verbal, that's just the fault of jllm or whatever you're using to rp with.

This bot was created some time ago so I've decided to remake it! The remake has actual outdoor sex :> Click here for the remake.

Art credit still missing, will look for a new bot image.

Thank you all for chatting!

This bot is made for JanitorAI, and only posted in JanitorAI. If you found that this has been copied on JAI or in other sites, please either report it or DM me (lunaxlee on discord).

Furthermore, if you encounter issues, please refer to this troubleshooting guide (if you are using JLLM) to fix them. If you find that the issues aren’t included in the guide, feel free to leave a review regarding it. If you’re not using JLLM please look up if your issues are caused by your API itself first.
